title: ROMANIA enforcement action against Order of General Nurses, Midwives and Medical Assistants of Romania – Neamt Branch (2,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on the Order of General Nurses, Midwives and Medical Assistants of Romania – Neamt Branch. The controller used video surveillance in a manner that was not in accordance with the GDPR. Legal basis: Art. 5 (1) a) GDPR, Art. 6 GDPR, Art. 1...
